name: Protein Oatmeal
instructions: In a saucepan, combine oats and almond milk. Heat over medium until boiling.
Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and stir in the protein powder and chia seeds.
Serve warm in a bowl.

name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
instructions: Toast the slices of whole wheat bread.
Mash avocado in a bowl with salt and pepper, then spread on the toasted bread.
Poach the eggs in simmering water for 3-4 minutes.
Top the avocado toast with the poached eggs and serve.

name: Keto Bacon & Eggs scramble
instructions: Fry bacon in a pan until crispy, then remove and set aside.
In the same pan, melt butter and pour in beaten eggs.
Scramble eggs over medium-low heat until fluffy.
Top with shredded cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon.

name: Vegan Smoothie Bowl
instructions: Blend frozen banana, mixed berries, and soy milk in a high-speed blender until thick and smooth.
Pour into a bowl.
Top with hemp seeds and fresh berries.
Eat immediately with a spoon.

name: Grilled Chicken Salad
instructions: Season chicken breast with salt, pepper, and herbs.
Grill in a pan for 6-7 minutes on each side until fully cooked.
Chop greens, tomatoes, and cucumber, and place in a bowl.
Slice the chicken, top the salad, and drizzle with olive oil.

name: Keto Salmon & Asparagus
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Place salmon and asparagus on a baking sheet.
Drizzle melted butter, lemon juice, salt, and pepper over both.
Bake for 12-15 minutes until salmon flakes easily with a fork.

name: Vegan Quinoa Bowl
instructions: Place warm cooked quinoa at the bottom of a bowl.
Rinse black beans and corn, arrange them on top.
Slice avocado and place beside the beans.
Drizzle with cilantro lime dressing and serve.

name: Turkey & Swiss Cheese Wrap
instructions: Lay tortilla flat and spread mustard down the center.
Layer turkey slices and Swiss cheese.
Add lettuce and tomato slices.
Roll up tightly, slice in half, and serve.

name: Lean Beef Stir-Fry
instructions: Slice beef into thin strips. Chop broccoli and pepper.
Heat sesame oil in a wok or large pan over high heat.
Add beef and stir-fry for 3 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add broccoli and pepper, stir-fry for 4 minutes with soy sauce. Return beef, toss, and serve over brown rice.

name: Baked Cod & Sweet Potato
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Wash and cube sweet potato. Toss in half the olive oil, paprika, and salt.
Spread sweet potato on a tray and roast for 15 minutes.
Add seasoned cod fillet to the tray. Drizzle fish with remaining oil and bake everything for another 12-15 minutes.

name: Tofu & Broccoli Stir-Fry
instructions: Press tofu to drain excess water, then cube.
Heat sesame oil in a pan, fry tofu cubes until golden brown.
Add broccoli and soy sauce. Cook until broccoli is tender-crisp.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve.

name: High-Protein Turkey Chili
instructions: In a pot, brown the ground turkey with chopped onion and garlic.
Stir in chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Add crushed tomatoes and drained kidney beans.
Simmer over low heat for 20 minutes before serving.

name: Greek Yogurt & Berries
instructions: Spoon Greek yogurt into a bowl.
Top with fresh mixed berries.
Drizzle honey over the berries and serve chilled.

name: Almond Butter & Apple
instructions: Wash and slice the apple.
Arrange apple slices on a plate.
Serve with almond butter on the side for dipping.

name: Whey Protein Shake
instructions: Add liquid to a shaker bottle.
Add the scoop of whey protein powder.
Shake vigorously for 30 seconds until fully mixed.

name: Hummus & Carrot Sticks
instructions: Peel carrots and cut them into sticks.
Spoon hummus onto a small plate or bowl.
Serve together as a healthy snack.

name: Spinach & Feta Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper.
In a non-stick skillet, sauté spinach until wilted.
Pour eggs over spinach, cook until set, then sprinkle with feta.

name: Blueberry Protein Pancakes
instructions: Mix pancake mix, protein powder, and water to form a batter.
Fold in blueberries.
Cook on a lightly oiled griddle until golden brown on both sides.

name: Cottage Cheese & Peaches
instructions: Spoon cottage cheese into a bowl.
Top with fresh peach slices.
Sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Keto Breakfast Burrito
instructions: Cook sausage patty and scramble eggs.
Warm the low-carb tortilla.
Fill tortilla with eggs, sausage, and cheese, then roll into a burrito.

name: Apple Cinnamon Chia Pudding
instructions: Mix chia seeds, almond milk, and cinnamon in a jar.
Stir well and refrigerate overnight.
In the morning, top with diced apple.

name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
instructions: Toast the bagel.
Spread cream cheese on both halves.
Top with smoked salmon and capers.

name: Tofu Scramble
instructions: Crumble tofu into a pan.
Add nutritional yeast, turmeric, and black salt.
Sauté until heated through, stirring occasionally.

name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Smoothie
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a glass and enjoy.

name: Breakfast Quesadilla
instructions: Place tortilla in a pan.
Layer one half with cheese, eggs, and beans.
Fold the other half over and cook until golden brown on both sides.

name: Paleo Sweet Potato Hash
instructions: Dice sweet potato and bell pepper.
Brown sausage in a skillet.
Add potatoes and pepper, cook until tender.

name: Almond Flour Waffles
instructions: Mix all ingredients to form a batter.
Cook in a preheated waffle iron until golden.

name: Overnight Oats
instructions: Combine oats, milk, and syrup in a jar.
Refrigerate overnight.
Top with berries before serving.

name: Sausage and Egg Casserole
instructions: Brown sausage and place in a baking dish.
Whisk eggs and cream, pour over sausage.
Top with cheese and bake at 180C for 20-25 mins.

name: Fruit and Nut Granola
instructions: Pour granola into a bowl.
Add milk and top with mixed nuts.

name: Shakshuka
instructions: Sauté onion, add tomatoes and spices, simmer for 10 mins.
Make wells in the sauce and crack eggs into them.
Cover and cook until eggs are set.

name: Gluten-Free Banana Muffins
instructions: Mix all ingredients.
Pour into a muffin tin.
Bake at 180C for 20 minutes.

name: Breakfast Sausage Patties
instructions: Mix pork with seasonings.
Form into patties.
Pan-fry until cooked through.

name: Simple French Toast
instructions: Whisk egg, milk, and cinnamon.
Dip bread slices in mixture.
Cook on a buttered pan until golden brown.

name: Vegan Breakfast Tacos
instructions: Warm tortillas.
Fill with tofu scramble and black beans.
Top with salsa.

name: Cream Cheese Pancakes
instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Pour small pancakes onto a hot, greased skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes per side.

name: Hard Boiled Eggs & Fruit
instructions: Boil eggs for 10 minutes, then peel.
Serve with a sliced apple.

name: Chocolate Avocado Mousse
instructions: Blend all ingredients until completely smooth.
Chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.

name: Breakfast BLT Sandwich
instructions: Cook bacon and fry an egg.
Assemble sandwich with bacon, lettuce, tomato, and the fried egg.

name: Coconut Flour Porridge
instructions: Whisk coconut flour and milk in a saucepan.
Heat over medium, stirring constantly, until thickened.
Top with berries.

name: Ham and Cheese Croissant
instructions: Slice croissant in half.
Layer ham and cheese inside.
Warm in oven or microwave until cheese is melted.

name: Acai Bowl
instructions: Blend acai and banana until smooth.
Pour into a bowl.
Top with granola and coconut flakes.

name: Steak and Eggs
instructions: Season and pan-sear steak to desired doneness.
In the same pan, fry two eggs in butter.
Serve steak and eggs together.

name: Cinnamon Roll Mug Cake
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a mug.
Microwave for 90 seconds.
Top with a simple icing if desired.

name: Vegan French Toast
instructions: Whisk milk, nutritional yeast, and cinnamon.
Dip bread slices in mixture.
Cook on a non-stick pan until golden brown.

name: Prosciutto-Wrapped Melon
instructions: Slice melon into wedges.
Wrap each wedge with a slice of prosciutto.

name: Egg White & Veggie Scramble
instructions: Sauté chopped peppers and onion until soft.
Add egg whites and scramble until cooked through.

name: Keto Coffee (Bulletproof)
instructions: Combine hot coffee, MCT oil, and butter in a blender.
Blend on high for 20-30 seconds until frothy.

name: Rice Cakes with Peanut Butter
instructions: Spread peanut butter on rice cakes.
Top with banana slices.

name: Breakfast Corn Dogs
instructions: Cook sausage links.
Dip sausages in pancake batter.
Fry or bake until golden brown.

name: Frittata with Asparagus & Goat Cheese
instructions: Sauté chopped asparagus in an oven-safe skillet.
Whisk eggs and pour over asparagus.
Top with goat cheese and bake at 180C for 15 mins.

name: Mango Lassi Smoothie
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Paleo Breakfast Skillet
instructions: Brown ground beef in a skillet.
Add butternut squash and cook until tender.
Stir in kale until wilted.

name: Savory Oatmeal with Egg
instructions: Cook oats with water until creamy.
Top with a fried egg and a drizzle of soy sauce.

name: Vegan Protein Waffles
instructions: Mix all ingredients to form a batter.
Cook in a preheated waffle iron.

name: Breakfast Pizza
instructions: Press dough onto a small pan.
Top with eggs, bacon, and cheese.
Bake at 200C for 12-15 minutes.

name: Keto Chaffles
instructions: Mix cheese and egg.
Pour half the mixture into a mini waffle maker and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Repeat with remaining mixture.

name: Green Smoothie
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: English Muffin with Sausage
instructions: Toast the English muffin.
Cook the sausage patty.
Assemble the sandwich with sausage and cheese.

name: Paleo Banana Pancakes
instructions: Whisk all ingredients together.
Pour small pancakes onto a greased skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes per side.

name: Breakfast Bowl
instructions: Place roasted potatoes in a bowl.
Top with scrambled eggs and salsa.

name: Chocolate Chip Baked Oats
instructions: Blend all ingredients except chocolate chips.
Stir in chips, pour into a ramekin.
Bake at 180C for 20-25 minutes.

name: Denver Omelette
instructions: Sauté ham, pepper, and onion.
Pour whisked eggs over the mixture.
Cook until set, then fold in half.

name: Congee (Rice Porridge)
instructions: Combine rice and water in a pot.
Bring to a boil, then simmer for 1-1.5 hours until thick and creamy.
Garnish with scallions.

name: Ricotta Toast with Honey
instructions: Toast the bread.
Spread ricotta cheese on top.
Drizzle with honey and sprinkle with pistachios.

name: Breakfast Strata
instructions: Layer bread and cooked sausage in a baking dish.
Whisk eggs and milk, pour over.
Bake at 180C for 30 minutes.

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
instructions: Warm tortilla.
Toss chicken and lettuce with dressing.
Fill tortilla and roll tightly.

name: Spicy Tuna Salad Sandwich
instructions: Mix tuna, mayonnaise, and sriracha.
Serve between two slices of bread.

name: Mediterranean Quinoa Salad
instructions: Chop cucumber and tomatoes.
Combine all ingredients in a bowl and toss with a lemon vinaigrette.

name: Black Bean Burgers
instructions: Mash beans and mix with breadcrumbs and diced onion.
Form into a patty and pan-fry until crisp.
Serve on a bun with your favorite toppings.

name: Caprese Sandwich
instructions: Slice roll.
Layer mozzarella, tomato, and basil.
Drizzle with balsamic glaze.

name: Keto Cobb Salad
instructions: Arrange chopped lettuce in a bowl.
Top with rows of chicken, crumbled bacon, chopped egg, avocado, and blue cheese.
Serve with ranch dressing.

name: Lentil Soup
instructions: Sauté chopped carrot and celery.
Add lentils and broth.
Simmer for 25-30 minutes until lentils are tender.

name: Shrimp and Avocado Salad
instructions: Chop shrimp, avocado, and red onion.
Gently toss with lime juice, salt, and pepper.

name: Beef and Broccoli Bowl
instructions: Stir-fry sliced steak until browned.
Add broccoli and sauce, cook until tender-crisp.
Serve over rice.

name: Leftover Chicken & Veggies
instructions: Simply reheat leftover chicken and vegetables in a microwave or pan.

name: Vegan Chickpea Salad Sandwich
instructions: Mash chickpeas.
Mix with vegan mayo and diced celery.
Serve as a sandwich.

name: BLT Salad
instructions: Cook and crumble bacon.
Toss lettuce and tomatoes with ranch dressing.
Top with bacon crumbles.

name: Pasta Salad
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
Toss to combine.
Serve chilled.

name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
instructions: Cook ground turkey.
Mix with rice and sauce.
Stuff into a halved bell pepper and bake at 180C for 25 mins.

name: Egg Roll in a Bowl
instructions: Brown pork in a skillet.
Add coleslaw mix and sauces.
Stir-fry until cabbage is wilted.

name: Sweet Potato and Black Bean Tacos
instructions: Warm tortillas.
Fill with roasted sweet potato and black beans.
Top with avocado slices.

name: Chicken Noodle Soup
instructions: Bring broth to a boil.
Add noodles and vegetables, cook until tender.
Stir in cooked chicken.

name: Sausage and Peppers Sub
instructions: Cook sausage.
Sauté peppers and onions.
Serve in a sub roll.

name: Paleo Tuna Stuffed Avocado
instructions: Halve avocado and remove pit.
Mix tuna and celery.
Fill avocado halves with tuna salad.

name: Deconstructed Sushi Bowl
instructions: Place rice in a bowl.
Top with fish, cucumber, and avocado.
Drizzle with soy sauce.

name: Tomato Soup and Grilled Cheese
instructions: Heat tomato soup.
Make a grilled cheese sandwich.
Serve together.

name: Keto Chicken Salad Lettuce Wraps
instructions: Mix chicken, mayo, and diced celery.
Spoon into lettuce cups.

name: Vegan Burrito Bowl
instructions: Layer rice, beans, and salsa in a bowl.
Top with guacamole.

name: Greek Chicken Pita
instructions: Warm pita.
Fill with chicken, lettuce, tomato, and tzatziki sauce.

name: Cold Soba Noodle Salad
instructions: Cook soba noodles and rinse with cold water.
Toss with edamame and sesame dressing.

name: Meatball Sub
instructions: Heat meatballs in marinara sauce.
Place in a sub roll and top with cheese.
Toast until cheese is melted.

name: Antipasto Salad
instructions: Chop meats and cheeses.
Toss with olives, artichoke hearts, and an Italian vinaigrette.

name: Falafel Pita
instructions: Warm pita.
Fill with falafel, hummus, and salad.

name: Philly Cheesesteak Bowl
instructions: Sauté steak, onions, and peppers.
Top with cheese and let it melt.
Serve over a bed of rice.

name: Spring Rolls
instructions: Soften rice paper in water.
Fill with noodles, protein, and herbs.
Roll tightly and serve with peanut sauce.

name: Club Sandwich
instructions: Layer turkey, bacon, lettuce, and tomato between three slices of toasted bread.
Secure with toothpicks and slice diagonally.

name: Sausage and Kale Soup
instructions: Brown sausage.
Add broth and kale, simmer until kale is tender.
Stir in heavy cream.

name: BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwich
instructions: Heat pulled pork with BBQ sauce.
Serve on a bun, topped with coleslaw.

name: Fish Tacos
instructions: Flake grilled fish.
Fill warm tortillas with fish and slaw.
Drizzle with aioli.

name: Vegan Mac and Cheese
instructions: Cook pasta.
Blend soaked cashews with nutritional yeast and water to make a cheese sauce.
Toss with cooked pasta.

name: Shepherd's Pie Stuffed Potato
instructions: Bake potato until tender.
Cook ground lamb with veggies.
Split potato and stuff with the lamb mixture.

name: Keto Pizza Bowl
instructions: Layer ingredients in a bowl.
Microwave or bake until cheese is melted and bubbly.

name: Curry Chicken Salad
instructions: Mix all ingredients together.
Serve on its own or in lettuce cups.

name: Bento Box
instructions: Arrange all components neatly in a compartmentalized lunch box.

name: White Bean and Tuna Salad
instructions: Combine all ingredients and toss gently.

name: Reuben Sandwich
instructions: Layer ingredients on bread.
Grill in a buttered pan until golden brown and cheese is melted.

name: Vegan Lentil Shepherd's Pie
instructions: Place lentil and veggie mixture in a ramekin.
Top with mashed sweet potato.
Bake at 180C for 20 minutes.

name: Keto Salmon Patties
instructions: Mix all ingredients.
Form into patties.
Pan-fry in oil until golden brown.

name: Chicken Gyro
instructions: Warm pita.
Fill with chicken and toppings.

name: Miso Soup with Tofu
instructions: Bring dashi to a simmer.
Whisk in miso paste.
Add cubed tofu and seaweed.

name: Italian Chopped Salad
instructions: Chop all ingredients.
Toss with an Italian vinaigrette.

name: Leftover Chili
instructions: Reheat chili.
Top with shredded cheese.

name: Paleo Chicken Tenders
instructions: Dredge chicken in egg, then in almond flour.
Bake or air fry until golden and cooked through.

name: Gado-Gado Salad
instructions: Arrange vegetables and tofu on a plate.
Drizzle generously with peanut sauce.

name: Sloppy Joes
instructions: Brown ground beef and drain.
Stir in sauce and simmer.
Serve on a bun.

name: Sheet Pan Lemon Herb Chicken & Veggies
instructions: Toss all ingredients with olive oil, lemon juice, and herbs.
Spread on a sheet pan.
Roast at 200C for 30-35 minutes.

name: Classic Spaghetti Bolognese
instructions: Brown beef with onion and garlic.
Add tomato sauce and simmer for at least 30 minutes.
Serve over cooked spaghetti.

name: Vegan Coconut Chickpea Curry
instructions: Sauté onions and garlic, add curry powder.
Stir in coconut milk and chickpeas, simmer for 15 mins.
Wilt in spinach and serve over rice.

name: Keto Zucchini Lasagna
instructions: Slice zucchini into thin planks.
Layer zucchini with cooked ground beef, ricotta, and mozzarella.
Bake at 180C for 30 minutes.

name: Pesto Pasta with Cherry Tomatoes
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions.
Toss hot pasta with pesto and halved cherry tomatoes.
Top with parmesan cheese.

name: Chicken and Black Bean Enchiladas
instructions: Mix chicken and beans, fill tortillas.
Roll up and place in a baking dish.
Top with sauce and cheese, bake at 180C for 20 mins.

name: Paleo Shepherd's Pie
instructions: Brown lamb with vegetables.
Place in a baking dish.
Top with mashed cauliflower and bake at 200C until golden.

name: Teriyaki Tofu with Jasmine Rice
instructions: Pan-fry cubed tofu until golden.
Add teriyaki sauce and simmer.
Serve over rice with steamed broccoli.

name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Brown beef and mix with taco seasoning.
Fill shells with beef and top with lettuce, tomato, and cheese.
